case_title: NIMA PAKRAVAN VS. INDYMAC MORTGAGE SERVICES et al

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-07-2012 02:00 PM FOR DEPT 610
RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE WHY SANCTIONS SHOULD NOT BE IMPOSED FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAKRAVAN, NIMA

QUIET TITLE - REAL PROPERTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAKRAVAN, NIMA AS TO DEFENDANT INDYMAC MORTGAGE SERVICES CAPITOLONE, N.A. DOES 1 TO 10 NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-18-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-14-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         MAY-03-2012
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-18-2012 CONTINUED TO JUN-29-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-07-2012 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 2:00 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUN-29-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NO APPEARANCE, NOR OBJECTION FILED. CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING AUG-07-2012 AT 2:00 PM. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
